01700000-0170003f : 3000008.dsp_rproc hifi4-cfg
01701000-01701fff : 3003000.msgbox msgbox@3003000
02000000-020004ff : pio pinctrl@2000000
02001000-02001fff : 2001000.ccu ccu@2001000
02010000-02010fff : 2010000.iommu iommu@2010000
020500a0-020500bf : 20500a0.watchdog watchdog@20500A0
02500000-025003ff : uart
02500400-025007ff : uart
02500c00-02500fff : uart
02502800-02502bff : twi@2502800
03000008-0300000b : 3000008.dsp_rproc sram-for-cpux
03002000-03002fff : 3002000.dma-controller dma-controller@3002000
03003000-03003fff : 3003000.msgbox msgbox@3003000
04021000-04021fff : 4021000.sdmmc sdmmc@4021000
04022000-04022fff : 4022000.sdmmc sdmmc@4022000
0601f000-0601ffff : 3003000.msgbox msgbox@3003000
07010000-0701023f : 7010000.r_ccu r_ccu@7010000
07090000-0709031f : 7090000.rtc rtc@7090000
40000000-41ffffff : System RAM
  40008000-408fffff : Kernel code
  40a00000-40a970ef : Kernel data
4224c000-47ffffff : System RAM
